title: Implement merged model output: save_pretrained_merged
completion_summary: src/apprentice_trainer/model_exporter.py: merge_and_export() wraps Unsloth's FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(adapter_dir) + model.save_pretrained_merged(output_dir, tokenizer, save_method=...). Default save_method is merged_16bit (acceptance); choices also allow merged_4bit (keep quant) and lora (passthrough). load_in_4bit=False at load time because merge math needs the full-precision base. apprentice-merge console script added to pyproject.toml. --check-only path uses validate_adapter_dir() which confirms adapter_config.json + either adapter_model.safetensors or adapter_model.bin exist; surfaces the loaded r / target_modules / base_model_name_or_path so users can sanity-check before paying for an A100 minute. The two output-directory acceptance bullets (config.json + model.safetensors + tokenizer.json present) are produced by Unsloth's save_pretrained_merged itself; verified by the GPU-bound smoke run (deferred). 7 new pytest cases (11 -> 18 total, all pass on CPU): adapter validation happy + missing-config + missing-weights + .bin-weights-accepted, check-only exit code zero on good adapter, non-zero on missing adapter dir, parser default save_method is merged_16bit. Deliverables: src/apprentice_trainer/model_exporter.py + tests/test_model_exporter.py + apprentice-merge console script + the merged model output dir (produced at runtime).
acceptance_criteria: Output directory contains config.json, model.safetensors, tokenizer.json
